title: A Healthy Lifestyle
text: Omar believes that a healthy lifestyle is important for a good life. He tries to eat healthy food and drink enough water every day. He does not eat fast food very often because he wants to stay active and strong.
Omar also exercises three times a week. Sometimes he goes to the gym, and other times he prefers walking in the park. Although he is busy with work, he always finds time to take care of his health.
In the evening, Omar likes to relax and get enough sleep. He knows that good habits help him feel better and work more effectively every day.

questions.question: Why does Omar think a healthy lifestyle is important?
questions.answer: Because it helps him have a good life

questions.question: What kind of food does Omar try to eat?
Where does Omar exercise?
questions.answer: At the gym or in the park

questions.question: Why does Omar avoid fast food?
questions.answer: Because he wants to stay active and strong

questions.question: What does Omar do in the evening?
questions.answer: He relaxes and gets enough sleep

questions.question: Why do you think Omar makes time for his health even when he is busy?
questions.answer: Because he believes good health helps him feel better and work better every day
